metadata.name: Update a Stowage Plan in Real-Time

description: During vessel loading, a container that was planned to be loaded is found to be damaged. The planner must update the stowage plan.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification from operations that a specific container cannot be loaded.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner gets an alert that container XXXU1234567 is on hold.

nodes.task_description: Remove the held container from the active stowage plan.

expected_outcome.expected: The planner updates the plan to omit the held container.

nodes.task_description: Find a suitable replacement container from the yard and assign it to the now-empty slot on the vessel to maintain the planned weight and balance.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner finds a container of similar weight and destination and assigns it to the vessel slot, then re-sends the updated work sequence to the crane.
